name: Trinity_Hybrid_Ternary_GPTQ_XSA
author: gHashTag
description: Trinity Hybrid quantization: ternary {-1,0,+1} for MLP weights (base-3 packed, ~1.6 bpw) + int6 GPTQ for attention weights. MLP width increased from 3x to 5x to exploit ternary compression savings. Built on ValCalib_GPTQ_XSA_BigramHash3072 baseline.
changes: Added ternary quantization with per-group absmean scaling (group_size=128)
Added base-3 packing for ternary values (5 trits per byte)
Hybrid quantization dispatch: MLP -> ternary, attention -> int6 GPTQ
Updated dequantization to handle both ternary and int6 formats
